description: It's femininity celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled sandals from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office wear and for parties.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease.Heel: 3"UpperSuede footbed with a synthetic leather patch on the mid-length of the foot, and has a padded heel for absolute comfort and styleSynthetic leather forefoot and back heel straps, with an elasticated band running along the lateral ankle to the medial toe mound to offer a customised Fit in styleOutsoleNon-slip outsole with grooves and footwear design lugs on the forefootTextured rubber heel base for absolute grip even on smooth surfacesSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
